name: Sand Tarts # 2
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat butter until creamy, then gradually add sugar and beat until fluffy.
2. Add egg and salt, beating to a very light and smooth consistency.
3. Gradually incorporate the sifted flour and vanilla extract.
4. Wrap the dough in plastic wrap and refrigerate for 3 hours.
5. Roll out the chilled dough between sheets of wax paper or parchment until it is very thin (about 1/8 inch).
6. Cut into desired shapes using a flexible, sharp knife.
7. Place the cutouts on a buttered baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
8. Beat egg whites and sugar to soft peaks, then brush lightly onto the tops of the tarts.
9. Sprinkle cinnamon and sugar over the tarts to taste (avoid over-sprinkling).
10. Bake at 375°F for 10-12 minutes until golden around the edges.
11. Allow to cool slightly before removing from the sheet.
12. Store in an airtight container.
